title: AR Profile
description: A profile is a domain's commitment: which claims it runs, which record types it defines, which traits each record type conforms to, and which bindings parameterize generic claims. Profiles compose claims; they do not own check implementations. Each domain (JR, hydrogen, medical, ...) ships its own profile.

depends_on_profiles.description: Other profiles whose claims are inherited. JR depends on AR.PROFILE.CORE for substrate claims.

ir_version.description: IR vocabulary version this profile pins. May be omitted by IR-naive profiles.

bindings.description: Parameters supplied to generic claims that need profile-specific bindings (e.g. which record types are source-dependent).

record_types.description: Record types this profile declares. Each may compose zero or more AR traits.

schema_name.description: Short name used in bundle records' record_type field (e.g. 'holding_record').

conforms_to.description: Trait identifiers this record type claims to conform to. Conformance is verifiable; partial conformance is meaningful.
